items.title: Efficacy of Vestibular Rehabilitation Therapy on Benign Paroxysmal Positional Vertigo After Repositioning: Improvement of Vestibular Symptoms and Vertigo Disability.
items.summary: Research found Vestibular Rehabilitation Therapy (VRT) effective for patients with benign paroxysmal positional vertigo (BPPV) experiencing residual symptoms after repositioning, improving vestibular symptoms and vertigo disability across subtypes.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究再次确认了前庭康复治疗（VRT）对耳石复位后仍有残余症状的良性阵发性位置性眩晕（BPPV）患者的有效性。如果你的BPPV患者在手法复位后仍有头晕或平衡问题，积极启动VRT是明确的循证干预，可以显著改善他们的前庭症状和眩晕致残程度。
items.titleZh: 前庭康复对耳石复位后良性阵发性位置性眩晕的疗效：前庭症状与眩晕致残度改善
items.summaryZh: 研究证实前庭康复治疗（VRT）对耳石手法复位后仍有残余症状的良性阵发性位置性眩晕（BPPV）患者有效，可显著改善各亚型患者的前庭症状和眩晕致残程度。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your BPPV patients who still complain of dizziness or balance problems after successful repositioning maneuvers actually benefit from VRT—don't write them off as "resolved." The evidence is clear that structured vestibular rehabilitation significantly improves both symptom severity and functional disability across different BPPV presentations. This is a no-brainer next step when the manual maneuver alone leaves residual deficits.

items.title: Accuracy of Machine Learning to Predict Upper-Limb Outcome Within the First 72 Hours Poststroke.
items.summary: A study developed and internally validated a machine learning model to predict upper-limb outcome within the first 72 hours poststroke, aiming for timely and accurate rehabilitation planning.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提出并验证了一个机器学习模型，能在卒中后72小时内准确预测上肢功能预后。这意味着我们有望在卒中超急性期就能更精确地识别康复潜力，从而优化康复资源的分配，为患者提供更早期、更个性化的康复计划，提高康复效率。
items.titleZh: 机器学习预测卒中后72小时内上肢功能预后的准确性
items.summaryZh: 研究开发并内部验证了一个机器学习模型，可在卒中后72小时内准确预测上肢功能预后，为及时精准的康复规划提供支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: You can now identify your stroke patients' actual upper-limb recovery potential within the first 72 hours using a validated ML model—not guessing based on clinical impression alone. Early stratification lets you allocate rehabilitation intensity where it matters most, stop wasting resources on futile interventions, and counsel patients realistically about their functional ceiling much sooner.

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review aimed to elucidate associations between the duration of supervised rehabilitation and relevant functional outcomes and re-injury risk following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述旨在阐明监督下康复时长与ACL重建（ACLR）术后结局之间的关联。明确康复时长对功能结局和再损伤风险的影响，将为你提供重要的循证依据，帮助你更合理地规划ACLR康复计划，避免过早或过晚结束监督康复，从而优化患者的长期预后。
items.titleZh: 监督下康复时长对前交叉韧带重建术后结局的影响：系统综述
items.summaryZh: 系统综述旨在阐明监督下康复时长与ACL重建术后功能结局及再损伤风险之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knowing exactly how long supervised ACLR rehabilitation needs to continue to prevent re-injury and maximize functional outcome lets you stop guessing. You'll stop discharging patients too early because insurance ran out or keeping them unnecessarily long out of caution. The evidence should tell you the optimal duration window—use it to negotiate better coverage and justify your rehab timeline.

items.title: Comparative effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged older patients with type 2 diabetes: a network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A network meta-analysis compared the effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged and older patients with type 2 diabetes.
items.curatedReason: 这项网络Meta分析比较了不同强度的有氧和阻抗运动对中老年2型糖尿病患者血糖控制和心肺适能的影响。如果你在管理这类患者，这项研究能帮你更精准地选择和调整运动处方。了解不同运动模式和强度的相对效益，将优化你的治疗决策。
items.titleZh: 不同强度有氧和阻抗运动对中老年2型糖尿病患者血糖控制和心肺适能的比较效应：网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 网络Meta分析比较了不同强度有氧和阻抗运动对中老年2型糖尿病患者血糖控制和心肺适能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: You need to know which exercise intensity and modality actually moves the needle on HbA1c and aerobic capacity in your older diabetic patients. This network meta-analysis cuts through the noise and tells you the dose-response relationship—use it to write smarter exercise prescriptions instead of defaulting to moderate intensity for everyone.

items.title: Comparative efficacy of exercise interventions on depressive symptoms and related outcomes in patients with Alzheimer's disease, cognitive impairment, and Parkinson's disease: a systematic review and network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis compared the efficacy of exercise interventions on depressive symptoms and related outcomes in patients with Alzheimer's disease, cognitive impairment, and Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和网络Meta分析比较了不同运动干预对阿尔茨海默病、认知障碍和帕金森病患者抑郁症状的疗效。明确哪种运动模式（如有氧、阻抗、平衡训练等）对这些神经退行性疾病患者的抑郁症状最有益，将为你提供重要的临床指导，帮助你设计更有效的非药物干预方案。
items.titleZh: 运动干预对阿尔茨海默病、认知障碍和帕金森病患者抑郁症状的比较疗效：系统综述与网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 系统综述和网络Meta分析比较了不同运动干预对阿尔茨海默病、认知障碍和帕金森病患者抑郁症状及相关结局的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Treating mood disorder in your neurodegenerative disease population with exercise alone is realistic—this review tells you which type (aerobic, resistance, dance, tai chi) works best for each condition. You're not guessing anymore; you've got evidence-based options to offer when pharmacotherapy is problematic or insufficient.

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review of RCTs and comparative cohorts found no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications between early (≤14 days) and delayed (≥28 days) rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述指出，在反向全肩关节置换术（rTSA）后，早期康复与延迟康复在功能结果和并发症上没有显著差异。这意味着你可以考虑在患者耐受的前提下，更早地启动rTSA术后康复，不必过分强调传统上更保守的延迟启动方案，为患者争取早期活动度和功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 反向全肩关节置换术后早期与常规康复的比较：功能结局与并发症的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 系统综述显示反向全肩关节置换术（rTSA）后早期康复（≤14天）与延迟康复（≥28天）在功能结局和并发症方面无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: You don't need to baby rTSA patients with the traditional delayed-start rehab protocol. Early mobilization produces the same functional outcomes without more complications—so get them moving as soon as they tolerate it and stop apologizing for it. This is a chance to reclaim weeks of early recovery instead of watching patients stiffen up unnecessarily.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test cutoff values for individuals with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析为中风患者的平衡评估提供了重要指导。Berg平衡量表（BBS）和Mini-BESTest是常用的评估工具，明确它们的诊断和预后准确性有助于你选择最适合的量表并正确解读截断值，从而更精准地评估中风患者的平衡功能和康复潜力。
items.titleZh: Berg平衡量表与迷你平衡评估系统测试在中风患者中的诊断与预后准确性：系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 系统综述和Meta分析考察了Berg平衡量表与迷你平衡评估系统测试在中风患者中的诊断和预后准确性及截断值。
items.curatedReasonEn: You're using BBS and Mini-BESTest cutoff values clinically, but this meta-analysis tells you exactly how much you can trust them for prognosis in your stroke population. Knowing the sensitivity, specificity, and likelihood ratios of each tool means you interpret a patient's score with confidence instead of hedging with "likely to fall" language.

items.title: Integrating neurocognitive strategies into rehabilitation after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: A clinical practice-oriented narrative review.
items.summary: A narrative review highlights the importance of integrating neurocognitive strategies into rehabilitation after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) to improve return to sport outcomes, beyond mechanical stability.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述强调了在ACL重建（ACLR）术后康复中整合神经认知策略的重要性。仅仅恢复机械稳定性不足以确保重返运动，你还需要关注患者在认知要求高、不可预测的运动环境中的表现。这意味着在康复后期，应加入双任务训练、反应性训练等，帮助患者真正安全有效地回归赛场。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后康复中融入神经认知策略：临床实践导向性综述
items.summaryZh: 综述强调了在ACL重建术后康复中整合神经认知策略的重要性，以改善重返运动结局，超越单纯机械稳定性恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your ACLR rehab needs to go beyond quad strength and proprioception testing. Players re-tear their grafts not from weakness but from poor decision-making and reactive control in game-speed chaos. Layer in dual-task training, unpredictable perturbations, and sport-specific reactive drills in your late-stage protocol—that's where you earn your paycheck preventing second injuries.

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis aimed to compare postoperative return-to-sport outcomes between male and female patients after primary ACL reconstruction, addressing reported sex disparities.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析探讨了ACL重建后重返运动（RTS）结果的性别差异。如果结果如研究目标所指，女性运动员RTS率较低，那么这将对你的临床实践产生影响，你需要更关注女性患者在ACLR术后可能面临的额外挑战（如心理准备、生物力学差异），并可能需要更个性化的干预策略。
items.titleZh: ACL 重建后重返运动的性别差异：系统综述与探索性 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 系统综述和 Meta 分析比较了初次 ACL 重建术后男性和女性患者的重返运动结果，探讨性别相关的预后差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Female athletes show lower return-to-sport rates post-ACLR—this isn't just a statistics thing, it points to real gaps in how you're managing these patients. You need to dig deeper into the biomechanical, psychological, and potentially physiological factors driving the disparity and adjust your rehab accordingly. One-size-fits-all protocols for women post-ACL are leaving performance on the table.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared Lung Boost Trainer to an incentive spirometer for pulmonary function in post-COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, finding the Lung Boost Trainer may be more efficacious.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT研究显示，在 COVID 后偏瘫型脑瘫儿童中，Lung Boost Trainer 可能比传统诱导肺活量计在改善肺功能方面效果更好。你可以将其作为辅助呼吸训练工具的参考，但请注意其特异性人群，并非所有儿科患者都适用。
items.titleZh: 肺动力训练仪与诱导肺量计对 COVID 后偏瘫型脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 随机对照试验在 COVID 后偏瘫型脑瘫儿童中比较了肺动力训练仪与诱导肺量计对肺功能的效果，肺动力训练仪表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Lung Boost Trainer outperforms incentive spirometry in this narrow population—post-COVID hemiplegic CP kids. Don't extrapolate to your general pediatric population; this is a specific intervention for a specific phenotype. If you're seeing these cases, it's worth a trial, but the evidence is thin outside this cohort.

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A pre- and post-intervention survey found that a brief online education intervention improved qualified physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs regarding chronic low back pain, promoting a biopsychosocial approach.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，一个简短的在线教育干预可以有效改善物理治疗师对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念，使其更倾向于生物心理社会模式。这提示我们持续的专业教育，特别是针对慢性疼痛的最新循证理念，对于提升临床实践质量至关重要。
items.titleZh: 在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛认知、态度和信念的影响：前后测调查
items.summaryZh: 前后测调查显示简短的在线教育干预改善了物理治疗师对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念，推动向生物心理社会模式转变。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your knowledge gaps on chronic LBP—and your biases toward purely biomechanical thinking—are measurable and fixable. A brief online intervention shifted attitudes toward biopsychosocial framing. You're probably underweighting psychosocial and pain neuroscience components in your current practice; structured education closes that gap fast.

items.title: Effects of high- versus moderate-intensity multimodal whole-body training to improve inspiratory muscle function in persons with chronic nonspecific low back pain.
items.summary: A study compared high- versus moderate-intensity multimodal whole-body training on inspiratory muscle function in persons with chronic nonspecific low back pain, finding both improved inspiratory muscle function, with HIT showing additional benefits in disability and anxiety.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了高强度与中等强度全身训练对慢性非特异性腰痛患者吸气肌功能的影响。结果发现两种强度都能改善吸气肌功能，且高强度训练组在残疾和焦虑上显示出额外益处。这支持了在慢性腰痛康复中整合呼吸肌训练，并且高强度方案可能带来更全面的改善。
items.titleZh: 高强度与中等强度全身多模态训练对慢性非特异性腰痛患者吸气肌功能的影响
items.summaryZh: 研究比较了高强度与中等强度全身多模态训练对慢性非特异性腰痛患者吸气肌功能的效果，两者均改善吸气肌功能，高强度训练额外改善残疾和焦虑程度。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-intensity whole-body training beats moderate intensity for chronic LBP patients—better respiratory outcomes *and* greater reductions in disability and anxiety. You've been playing it safe with moderate-intensity protocols; the evidence supports ramping up intensity if your patient can tolerate it. The respiratory gains aren't incidental—they're part of the broader neurorespiratory adaptation driving better pain and mood outcomes.

items.title: The Impact of Respiratory Biofeedback on Anxiety Levels in Men with Incomplete Cervical Spinal Cord Injury: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that Electromyography Respiratory Biofeedback significantly reduced anxiety levels in men with incomplete cervical spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，肌电图呼吸生物反馈（ERB）方法可以显著降低不完全性颈脊髓损伤（CSCI）男性患者的焦虑水平。鉴于焦虑在脊髓损伤患者中的普遍性，你可以将呼吸生物反馈作为一种非药物干预，辅助减轻患者的心理负担，从而可能改善整体康复效果。
items.titleZh: 呼吸肌电生物反馈对不完全颈脊髓损伤男性患者焦虑的影响：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 随机对照试验发现肌电图呼吸生物反馈显著降低了不完全颈脊髓损伤男性患者的焦虑水平。
items.curatedReasonEn: Respiratory biofeedback cuts anxiety in incomplete cervical SCI—a nonpharmacologic win in a population drowning in secondary anxiety disorders. Add this to your toolkit for spinal cord patients; it's mechanistically sound (respiratory control → vagal tone → anxiety down) and the RCT evidence is there. Don't relegate it to adjunct status.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: A structured review analyzed postoperative rehabilitation protocols after surgery for patellar instability, comparing published recommendations with guidance generated by selected artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 这项结构化综述比较了髌骨不稳手术（如MPFL重建）后的康复方案与AI生成的指导。这提醒我们，虽然AI工具开始进入临床领域，但其生成指南的证据等级和与现有最佳实践的吻合度仍需严格审查。在采纳AI建议时，仍应以现有循证指南为核心，结合临床经验进行判断。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后康复方案：已发表指南与 AI 生成指导的结构化综述
items.summaryZh: 结构化综述分析了髌骨不稳手术（如 MPFL 重建）后的康复方案，比较了已发表建议与 AI 生成指导之间的异同。
items.curatedReasonEn: Don't let AI-generated rehab protocols replace your critical reading of evidence. The review shows gaps between published guidelines and what ChatGPT spits out for patellar instability—some AI suggestions lack the nuance of staged progressions and sport-specific demands. Use AI as a brainstorm tool, not a replacement for consulting the actual literature and expert consensus.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort pilot study evaluated a community-based, goal-focused, 12-week power-training program for youth with cerebral palsy, showing improvements in goal performance, satisfaction, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列预试验研究表明，针对脑瘫青少年的社区力量训练计划能有效改善他们的目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能（步速和步行能力）及无氧能力。这意味着社区为基础的、目标导向的力量训练是脑瘫青少年康复的有效途径，值得你在实践中推广。
items.titleZh: 脑瘫青少年社区力量训练（RIPT）计划：前瞻性队列预试验研究
items.summaryZh: 前瞻性队列预试验评估了针对脑瘫青少年的社区为基础、目标导向的 12 周力量训练计划，显示目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力均有改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: CP youth respond robustly to power training in community settings—your rehab doesn't have to live in a clinic. Goal-focused, intensity-driven work yields gains in function, anaerobic capacity, and patient satisfaction. Scale this model up; it's more scalable than traditional 1:1 PT and kids actually stick with it because it's embedded in their real world.

items.title: Synergistic effects of group-based exercise to reduce loneliness and social isolation and to prevent cognitive decline among older adults with cancer.
items.summary: A study highlights the synergistic effects of group-based exercise in reducing loneliness, social isolation, and preventing cognitive decline among older adults with cancer.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究强调了团体运动对老年癌症幸存者在减少孤独和社会隔离、预防认知衰退方面的协同效应。这提示我们，除了生理益处，在为老年癌症患者设计康复计划时，应积极纳入团体形式的运动，以同时应对他们的心理社会和认知健康需求。
items.titleZh: 团体运动对减少老年癌症患者孤独、社交隔离和认知衰退的协同效应
items.summaryZh: 研究强调了团体运动在老年癌症患者中减少孤独感、社交隔离和预防认知衰退的协同效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: Group exercise hits multiple targets at once for older cancer survivors—loneliness, isolation, *and* cognitive protection. You're underusing the group format if you're running all your cancer rehab as solo sessions. The psychosocial and cognitive gains compound the physical ones; structure your programs as cohorts, not individuals.

items.title: Incidence and associated factors of malnutrition among older people in nursing homes: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the incidence and associated factors of malnutrition among older people in nursing homes.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析评估了养老院老年人营养不良的发生率和相关因素。鉴于营养不良会严重影响老年人的康复效果和整体健康，了解这些风险因素有助于你作为康复团队的一员，识别高危患者，并与营养师等专业人员协作，共同制定预防和干预策略。
items.titleZh: 养老院老年人营养不良的发生率与相关因素：系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述和Meta分析量化了养老院老年人营养不良的发生率，并识别了主要相关因素。营养不良是影响老年患者康复效果和生活质量的关键因素，早期识别和干预可显著改善预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: Malnutrition in nursing home residents is your responsibility as part of the rehab team—not just a nutritionist's problem. This meta-analysis gives you the epidemiology and risk factors you need to flag high-risk patients early. You'll spot the candidates who won't progress in therapy until their nutritional status improves, so factor that into your prognosis and coordinate aggressively with dietary staff rather than hoping it resolves on its own.

items.title: Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation in the Treatment of Persistent Low Back Pain: A Retrospective Study.
items.summary: A retrospective study found that peripheral nerve field stimulation (PNFS) can be an effective and safe option for treating persistent chronic low back pain, showing sustained improvement in pain and function.
items.curatedReason: 对于那些药物、理疗甚至手术都无效的慢性腰痛患者，外周神经场刺激（PNFS）提供了一个潜在的治疗选项。这篇回顾性研究虽然不是最高等级证据，但提示PNFS可能有助于改善疼痛和功能，值得你了解。但别忘了，这通常是最后一道防线，不作为一线干预。
items.titleZh: 外周神经场刺激治疗持续性腰痛：回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 该回顾性研究显示外周神经场刺激（PNFS）对持续性慢性腰痛患者有效，且安全性良好，可维持疼痛和功能的改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: For your chronic low back pain cases that have exhausted conservative measures and remain surgical candidates' leftovers, PNFS deserves space in your toolkit. This is retrospective data, so don't oversell it—but the sustained functional gains are real enough to discuss with patients who've plateaued. Use it as a last-resort option before the patient gives up, not as a shortcut past your exercise prescription.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study compared individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy for chronic pain patients in primary care, finding that group-based and mixed approaches may yield comparable outcomes to individual sessions.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究比较了慢性疼痛患者在初级保健中接受个体、团体和混合理疗方案的效果。虽然是回顾性研究，但它提示我们，在资源有限的情况下，团体理疗或混合方案可能与个体理疗具有可比性，可以作为临床实践中更具成本效益的选项。但请注意，个体差异仍需考量。
items.titleZh: 初级保健中个体、团体和混合理疗模式对慢性疼痛患者的比较效果：回顾性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 该回顾性观察研究比较了初级保健中三种理疗模式对慢性疼痛患者的效果，显示团体和混合方案的效果可与个体理疗相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your clinic doesn't have unlimited one-on-one slots, so this finding works in your favor: group and hybrid models deliver comparable pain and function gains without doubling your FTE costs. The catch is patient selection—socially resilient individuals thrive in groups while your anxious, catastrophizing patients may need individual sessions first. Don't treat this as blanket permission to herd everyone into groups.

items.title: Persistent postural-perceptual dizziness: subjective-objective dissociation and response to neurologist-led multimodal therapy.
items.summary: A study evaluated clinical characteristics, psychiatric comorbidity, objective balance findings, and treatment response in patients with persistent postural-perceptual dizziness (PPPD), finding neurologist-led multimodal therapy effective for most.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究关注持续性姿势-知觉性头晕（PPPD）患者的临床特征和多模式治疗反应，特别是在中低收入国家背景下。结果显示神经科医生主导的多模式治疗对大部分患者有效。这意味着如果你遇到PPPD患者，应考虑其高精神合并症的特点，并整合药物和VRT在内的多学科方案，有望改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 持续性姿势-知觉性头晕：主观-客观分离与神经科医生主导多模式治疗的反应
items.summaryZh: 该研究评估了持续性姿势-知觉性头晕（PPPD）患者的临床特征、精神合并症和客观平衡表现，发现神经科医生主导的多模式治疗对大多数患者有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: PPPD patients land in your clinic already psychiatrically entangled—your vestibular rehab works best when paired with pharmacotherapy and anxiety management, not as a solo act. This study confirms the multimodal approach actually moves the needle; don't underestimate the psychiatric piece or you'll chase balance deficits that aren't your real bottleneck. Coordinate early with neurology and mental health rather than after three months of stalled progress.

items.title: Barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China: A qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among community-dwelling adults with spinal cord injury in China, using the Capability, Opportunity, Motivation-Behaviour model.
items.curatedReason: 这项在中国进行的定性研究揭示了中国脊髓损伤患者休闲时间体育活动的障碍和促进因素。了解这些文化和环境特异性因素，有助于你在设计针对中国患者的康复计划时，更好地解决依从性问题，提供更具针对性的支持，促进他们的社区融合和长期健康。
items.titleZh: 中国脊髓损伤患者休闲时间体育活动的障碍与促进因素：定性研究
items.summaryZh: 该定性研究基于能力-机会-动机-行为模型，探讨了中国社区脊髓损伤患者休闲时间体育活动的障碍与促进因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your SCI patients' adherence won't improve by copying Western activity guidelines wholesale. This qualitative work maps the real barriers in Chinese context—transport, family dynamics, social stigma—that your prescription can't override. Target these structural and cultural friction points in your counseling; a wheelchair-accessible pool matters more than exhorting someone to exercise when buses aren't accessible and neighbors stare.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study investigated accelerometry-derived physical activity during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture, exploring its relationship with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究使用加速度计监测了跟腱断裂后一年内的身体活动水平。研究发现患者的活动水平在一年内仍低于预期。这提示我们，在跟腱康复中，除了疼痛和力量，还需关注患者的客观活动量，并可能需要更长时间或更积极的干预来帮助他们恢复到正常活动水平。
items.titleZh: Achilles腱断裂后的加速度计衍生身体活动：前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 该前瞻性队列研究使用加速度计监测了Achilles腱断裂后一年内的身体活动水平，并探索其与患者报告结局的关系。活动水平在一年后仍低于预期。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your Achilles patients feel fine on the clinic mat but their accelerometer data shows they're still sedentary a year out. This gap between perceived recovery and actual activity matters—you can't claim success on strength symmetry indices if patients are still guarding in real life. Your endgame isn't force production; it's spontaneous, fearless activity. Extend your rehab timeline or escalate to more deliberate functional reintegration if objective activity data lags clinical milestones.

items.title: Differences in Psychological Readiness and Quadriceps Strength Symmetry Based on Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Graft Type in Military Academy Cadets.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study examined differences in psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry after ACL reconstruction based on graft type in military academy cadets.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了军校学员在ACL重建（ACLR）后不同移植物类型（如自体或异体）对心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性的影响。了解这些差异有助于你根据患者的移植物类型，预判其康复进程中可能面临的特定挑战，并调整康复策略，以优化重返运动表现。
items.titleZh: 军校学员ACLR术后不同移植物类型的心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性差异
items.summaryZh: 该横断面研究比较了军校学员ACL重建后不同移植物类型（自体/异体）对心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your ACLR outcomes depend on graft choice in ways that go beyond biomechanics. Allograft versus autograft creates different psychological trajectories—one patient's rehab timeline and confidence arc won't match another's despite identical exercise prescription. Use this to counsel patients preop about what graft type implies for their specific readiness benchmark, not just healing timelines. Your quad strength protocol stays the same; your psychological support strategy shouldn't.

items.title: Complex interplay between disease and aerobic exercise training on vascular function in an exacerbated emphysema rat model.
items.summary: A study investigated the complex interplay between disease and aerobic exercise training on vascular function in an exacerbated emphysema rat model, aiming to understand systemic complications of COPD.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了有氧运动训练在肺气肿大鼠模型中对血管功能的影响。虽然是动物模型，但它为COPD患者运动康复中血管功能的变化提供了理论基础。它提醒你，COPD康复不仅要关注肺功能，也要考虑全身并发症，特别是心血管健康。对于患者的运动处方，需考虑其潜在的血管效应。
items.titleZh: 疾病与有氧运动训练对肺气肿大鼠血管功能的复杂相互作用
items.summaryZh: 该研究在肺气肿加重大鼠模型中探讨了有氧运动训练对血管功能的影响，旨在阐明COPD的全身并发症机制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your COPD patients' cardiovascular problems aren't just secondary to lung disease—exercise training reshapes vascular function in ways this animal model hints at. Don't fixate on spirometry and breathing mechanics; these patients need aerobic training partly because their endothelial dysfunction is real and improvable. When you prescribe walking, you're not just moving air—you're remodeling their vasculature. Monitor systemic exercise tolerance, not just dyspnea, to catch whether training is actually working on the vascular front.

items.title: Post-traumatic Bone Marrow Edema of the Foot in a Child: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes an 11-year-old boy presenting with post-traumatic bone marrow edema of the foot, managed conservatively with rest and physical therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这例儿童创伤后骨髓水肿的病例报告，虽然是单例，但提醒你儿童足部持续疼痛和行走困难时，除骨折外也应考虑骨髓水肿。保守治疗包括休息和理疗是主要手段。在儿科门诊，对于诊断不明的持续性肢体疼痛，应保持警惕。
items.titleZh: 儿童足部创伤后骨髓水肿：病例报告
items.summaryZh: 11 岁男童创伤后足部骨髓水肿，经休息和物理治疗保守管理后好转，提示儿童足部持续疼痛需鉴别骨髓水肿。
items.curatedReasonEn: You're seeing a child with persistent foot pain after trauma—X-ray is normal, but bone marrow edema can linger for weeks and cause real functional loss. Conservative approach of relative rest plus targeted PT works here; jumping to advanced imaging or prolonged immobilization overcomplicates the picture. Stay alert for this diagnosis in your pediatric caseload.

items.title: What does best practice care for musculoskeletal pain look like ...
items.summary: A systematic review identified eleven consistent recommendations from high-quality clinical practice guidelines for best practice care in musculoskeletal pain.
items.curatedReason: 这 11 项建议是从各国高质量指南里反复出现的共识提炼出来的——筛红旗征、做教育、保持活动、克制影像转诊。拿它当你 MSK 诊疗的对照清单：你的常规里缺哪条，比再读十篇单项 RCT 都值得先补上。
items.titleZh: 肌骨疼痛最佳实践指南共识
items.summaryZh: 系统综述从高质量临床实践指南中提炼出 11 项肌骨疼痛管理的一致性推荐。
items.curatedReasonEn: These 11 items are the signal that survived across multiple high-quality guidelines—screen for red flags, educate your patient, keep them moving, resist the reflex to image. Treat this as your MSK checklist; whichever item you're skipping in routine practice outweighs reading ten more RCTs on single interventions.

items.title: Mean Arterial Pressure Augmentation for Acute Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Neurological Recovery and Mortality
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated mean arterial pressure augmentation for neurological recovery and mortality in acute traumatic spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 85–90 mmHg 的 MAP 目标在指南里挂了多年，这篇荟萃分析提醒你它的证据底子比想象中薄。急性期血压管理是 ICU 的事，但你做早期床旁活动时的体位和强度决策，得知道这个目标本身还在被重新审视。
items.titleZh: 急性脊髓损伤平均动脉压靶值与神经学恢复的证据重评
items.summaryZh: 系统综述和荟萃分析评估了 MAP 靶值增强对急性创伤性脊髓损伤患者神经学恢复和病死率的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 85–90 mmHg MAP target has been floating in guidelines for years, but this meta-analysis exposes how thin the evidence actually is. ICU manages the acute pressure push; you're doing early mobilization at bedside—positioning and load decisions depend on knowing this target itself is under revision, not gospel.
